title: Dataset for: From resistance traits to sanitation failure risk: Co-occurrence of biofilm formation and disinfectant–antimicrobial resistance in Staphylococcus spp. along the dairy production chain
author: Karadal, Fulden
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset contains the data presented in the tables of the associated manuscript entitled "Biofilm formation and disinfectant resistance in Staphylococcus spp. isolated from the dairy production chain". Raw experimental data are not available; all analyses were performed using summarized table data.
steps_raw: This dataset contains the data presented in the tables of the associated manuscript entitled "Biofilm formation and disinfectant resistance in Staphylococcus spp. isolated from the dairy production chain". Raw experimental data are not available; all analyses were performed using summarized table data.
